home.title: PUT Notes
home.subtitle: Notes from Poznań University of Technology
home.welcome: Welcome to the student notes repository from Poznań University of Technology!
home.description: This website contains collected notes from lectures, laboratories and exercises that may be helpful for current and future students.
home.chooseSemesterDesc: Select a semester to see available courses and notes.
home.aboutDesc1: This repository contains notes from classes at Poznań University of Technology, written in Markdown format.
home.aboutDesc2: All notes are available for students and are intended to facilitate learning and preparation for exams.
home.aboutDesc3: Notes are regularly updated and expanded.
home.clickToView: Click to see courses and projects
